title.en: Google Introduces Device Bound Session Credentials to Protect Browser Cookies
title.zh: Google 推出设备绑定会话凭证，强化浏览器 Cookie 安全防护

summary.en: Google's security team has published details on Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC), a new web platform security mechanism that cryptographically binds browser cookies to a specific device using hardware-backed keys. DBSC addresses cookie theft attacks where stolen session cookies are replayed from other machines, a common attack vector against web applications. The proposal builds on existing secure enclave hardware already present in modern devices and is designed for eventual standardization as a web platform primitive. It is a significant step forward for authentication security on the web.
summary.zh: Google 安全团队发布了设备绑定会话凭证（DBSC）的详细介绍，这是一种新的 Web 平台安全机制，通过硬件密钥将浏览器 Cookie 与特定设备进行加密绑定。DBSC 解决了 Cookie 被盗后在其他设备上重放的攻击问题，这是针对 Web 应用的常见攻击向量。该提案基于现代设备中已有的安全飞地硬件，并被设计为未来标准化的 Web 平台原语，是 Web 身份验证安全的重要进步。

title.en: Microsoft Suspends Dev Accounts for High-Profile Open Source Projects
title.zh: 微软暂停多个知名开源项目的开发者账户

summary.en: Microsoft has suspended the developer accounts of contributors to several high-profile open source projects, reportedly as part of a coordinated policy action. The suspensions affected maintainers of major projects hosted on GitHub, raising concerns about platform dependency risk for critical open-source infrastructure. The incident re-ignited debate about the risks of relying on a single corporate platform for open source hosting and the need for resilient, decentralized alternatives. The story gathered 349 Hacker News upvotes and 116 comments.
summary.zh: 微软暂停了多个知名开源项目贡献者的开发者账户，据报道此举是某项协调政策行动的一部分。被暂停的账户涉及 GitHub 上托管的重要项目维护者，引发外界对关键开源基础设施平台依赖风险的担忧。此事再次点燃了关于依赖单一企业平台进行开源托管风险的讨论，以及构建更具韧性的去中心化替代方案的必要性。该报道在 Hacker News 获得 349 个赞和 116 条评论。

title.en: France Launches Government-Wide Linux Desktop Plan as Windows Exit Begins
title.zh: 法国政府启动全国性 Linux 桌面迁移，正式开启脱微软之路

summary.en: France's government has announced a national plan to migrate public sector desktops from Windows to Linux, as part of a broader push for digital sovereignty and reducing dependency on extra-European tech companies. The initiative covers central government agencies and signals one of the largest Western government Linux migrations to date. The announcement was driven by concerns over geopolitical software dependencies and long-term security supply chain risks. It gathered over 768 Hacker News upvotes, reflecting wide interest from the developer community in government open-source adoption.
summary.zh: 法国政府宣布推行全国性公共部门桌面从 Windows 迁移至 Linux 的计划，这是推动数字主权、减少对欧洲以外科技公司依赖的更大战略的一部分。该举措涵盖中央政府机构，是迄今规模最大的西方政府 Linux 迁移行动之一。公告背后的驱动力来自对地缘政治软件依赖和长期安全供应链风险的担忧，在 Hacker News 获得逾 768 票赞，开发者社区对政府层面的开源采用表现出浓厚兴趣。

title.en: Simon Willison: OpenAI Voice Mode Runs on a Much Older, Weaker Model
title.zh: Simon Willison：OpenAI 语音模式背后是更旧、更弱的模型

summary.en: Developer and researcher Simon Willison highlighted a non-obvious reality about OpenAI's voice mode: it runs on a significantly older and weaker model than the latest text-based ChatGPT. Users who interact with AI through voice may assume they're accessing the most capable model, but the voice pipeline relies on a different, less powerful model due to latency and real-time constraints. Willison's observation sparked discussion about how model capability perception differs across modalities and the technical trade-offs involved in real-time AI voice interfaces.
summary.zh: 开发者和研究者 Simon Willison 揭示了 OpenAI 语音模式的一个不为人知的事实：它使用的模型比最新文本版 ChatGPT 明显更旧、更弱。通过语音与 AI 交互的用户可能以为在使用最强大的模型，但受限于延迟和实时性要求，语音流水线实际依赖一个不同的、性能较低的模型。Willison 的观察引发了关于不同模态下模型能力感知差异以及实时 AI 语音接口技术权衡的广泛讨论。

title.en: Claude Code Best Practice Guide Hits 35K Stars with 1,248 Daily Gain
title.zh: Claude Code 最佳实践指南以 1248 日增星冲至 35K

summary.en: A community-maintained repository of Claude Code best practices has reached over 35,000 GitHub stars with 1,248 new stars in a single day. The project aggregates community-sourced tips, workflows, and patterns for getting the best results from Claude as a coding agent. Its rapid growth follows the viral success of the andrej-karpathy-skills repository, reflecting a broader community movement to crowdsource and codify effective AI coding agent behavior. The momentum underscores growing consensus around specific prompting and workflow strategies for AI-assisted development.
summary.zh: 一个社区维护的 Claude Code 最佳实践仓库已累计超过 35000 颗 GitHub 星，单日新增 1248 颗。该项目汇集了社区贡献的使用技巧、工作流和模式，旨在最大化 Claude 作为编码 Agent 的效能。其快速增长紧随 andrej-karpathy-skills 仓库的病毒式传播，折射出社区众包并标准化有效 AI 编码 Agent 行为的更大浪潮，也表明特定提示词与工作流策略在 AI 辅助开发领域已逐渐形成社区共识。
